Naples Home Loans

FHA loans in Naples, Florida

Naples is one of the most affluent markets in the country, and that shapes how FHA works here. Collier County is a designated high-cost area, so its FHA limit is above Florida's floor — but much of Naples' luxury and coastal inventory still exceeds FHA limits. That doesn't mean FHA is off the table; it means knowing where it fits. FHA buyers in Naples tend to focus on condos, Golden Gate, and more affordable inland neighborhoods.

Collier County FHA limit (1-unit)$764,750

2026 single-family

Minimum down3.5%

With a 580+ score

Property types1–4 units

Owner-occupied

What the FHA limit means in Naples

Collier County is a designated high-cost area, so its 2026 single-family FHA limit is $764,750, above the $541,287 statewide floor — meaning you can finance higher-priced Naples homes than in most of Florida. Confirm Collier County's exact limit with HUD's official FHA loan-limit lookup. Even with the higher limit, much of Naples' luxury market is out of FHA range — FHA buyers here typically focus on condos and more affordable inland communities like Golden Gate.

Where FHA actually works in Naples' high-cost market

Being realistic helps. In Old Naples and along the coast, prices usually exceed FHA limits. But FHA is very usable in Golden Gate, parts of East Naples, and inland Collier, and on many condos — provided the building is FHA-approved or qualifies for Single-Unit Approval (see our condo guide). We'll confirm Collier's exact figure with HUD and pinpoint which Naples homes fit your FHA budget. Check the Florida FHA limits for context.

Down payment help for Naples buyers

You don't have to cover the down payment alone. FHA allows gift funds, sellers can contribute up to 6% toward closing costs, and Naples buyers can often pair FHA with assistance from the Florida Housing Finance Corporation and Collier County's local SHIP-funded programs. Funding and eligibility change frequently, so we'll help you confirm what's currently available — see our FHA down payment assistance guide.

Neighborhoods we serve in Naples

We help buyers throughout Naples and Collier County, including Golden Gate, North Naples, East Naples, and more affordable inland communities. Wherever you're looking, we'll explain your FHA loan limit, rate, and monthly payment — and get you pre-approved fast.

Questions & Answers

Frequently asked questions

What is the FHA loan limit in Naples (Collier County) for 2026?+
Collier County is a high-cost area, so its 2026 FHA limit is $764,750, above the $541,287 Florida floor. Confirm the exact current limit with HUD's official lookup.
Can I really use an FHA loan in expensive Naples?+
Yes, in the right segments. Much of Naples' luxury market exceeds FHA limits, but FHA works well for condos and more affordable areas like Golden Gate and inland Collier.
Can I buy a Naples condo with FHA?+
Yes, if the building is FHA-approved or the unit qualifies for Single-Unit Approval — common considerations in Naples. We check before you offer.
How much down payment do I need in Naples?+
As little as 3.5% with a 580+ score; gift funds and seller credits can help in a higher-priced market.
Do you serve all of Collier County?+
Yes — Naples, Marco Island, Immokalee, and surrounding Collier communities.
